hero.headline: MAHE Online MBA in Healthcare Management: Syllabus, Fees and Career Outcomes
hero.sub: NAAC A++ | NIRF #3 University 2025 | Institution of Eminence | UGC-DEB Approved | Total fees ₹2,92,000

sections.tldr: MAHE Online MBA in Healthcare Management covers health informatics, health education and communication, health insurance, healthcare operations, hospital planning, and quality management in healthcare. NAAC A++ NIRF #3 University with IoE tag. Total fee ₹2,92,000 (₹73,000/sem). Zero-cost EMI ₹12,167/month. Coursera Plus bundled free. 8 scholarship categories. Work experience required; fresh graduates submit SOP video.

about.body:
MAHE's Online MBA in Healthcare Management is built on the Manipal group's deep healthcare heritage. MAHE operates Kasturba Medical College and multiple hospital networks, giving this specialisation genuine institutional credibility in healthcare. Semester 3 covers health informatics (EHR/EMR systems, HMIS, telemedicine platform management, health data analytics), health education and communication (public health campaigns, patient communication, health literacy programme design), and health insurance (insurance product design, claims management, TPA operations, Ayushman Bharat PMJAY framework). Semester 4 adds healthcare operations management (OPD/IPD workflow optimisation, bed management, patient flow analysis, lean healthcare), hospital planning and infrastructure management (hospital project planning, biomedical equipment procurement, facility design, green hospital standards), and quality management in healthcare (NABH accreditation preparation, patient safety protocols, clinical audit methodology, infection control quality metrics).

MAHE's healthcare heritage is the key differentiator here. The Manipal group runs hospitals, medical colleges, and health sciences programmes. This is not an MBA programme adding healthcare as an afterthought. The curriculum reflects operational healthcare experience.

MAHE holds NIRF #3 University 2025, NAAC A++, and Institution of Eminence status. Coursera Plus is bundled free. At ₹2,92,000, the fee is premium but for healthcare management specifically, the Manipal brand carries significant weight with hospital chains and health systems.

Work experience in reputed organisations is required. Fresh graduates can apply with an SOP video.

EdifyEdu verifies data independently and takes no commission from any university.

syllabus.note: Semesters 1-2 cover the common MBA management core. Semesters 3-4 below show the Healthcare Management specialisation subjects.

subjects.name: Management Accounting
subjects.desc: Cost analysis, budgeting, variance analysis, and management decision-making using accounting data.

subjects.name: Legal Aspects of Business
subjects.desc: Contract law, consumer protection, intellectual property, company law basics, and regulatory compliance.

subjects.name: Minor Project
subjects.desc: Applied healthcare management research project supervised by faculty.

subjects.name: Health Informatics
subjects.desc: EHR/EMR system management, HMIS (Hospital Management Information Systems), telemedicine platform operations, health data analytics, and digital health record standards.

subjects.name: Health Education and Communication
subjects.desc: Public health campaign design, patient communication strategies, health literacy programme development, community health education, and behaviour change communication.

subjects.name: Health Insurance
subjects.desc: Insurance product design, claims management workflow, TPA operations, Ayushman Bharat PMJAY framework, and health insurance regulatory compliance.

subjects.name: Entrepreneurship and Innovation
subjects.desc: Startup ideation, business model canvas, lean startup methodology, and funding strategies.

subjects.name: Sustainability
subjects.desc: Sustainable business models, ESG frameworks, green hospital standards, and CSR strategy.

subjects.name: Capstone Project
subjects.desc: Healthcare capstone integrating Sem 1-4 learning with an industry-linked hospital or health systems problem.

subjects.name: Healthcare Operations Management
subjects.desc: OPD/IPD workflow optimisation, bed management systems, patient flow analysis, lean healthcare application, and healthcare capacity planning.

subjects.name: Hospital Planning and Infrastructure Management
subjects.desc: Hospital project planning, biomedical equipment procurement, facility design standards, green hospital compliance, and healthcare infrastructure budgeting.

subjects.name: Quality Management in Healthcare
subjects.desc: NABH accreditation preparation, patient safety protocols, clinical audit methodology, infection control quality metrics, and healthcare KPI dashboards.

whoHires.body:
MAHE MBA Healthcare Management graduates target roles across hospitals, health insurance, pharma, and health tech:

**Industries:** Hospital chains, health insurance, pharmaceutical companies, health tech startups, public health agencies, diagnostic chains, and healthcare consulting

**Entry-level roles:** Hospital Administrator (junior), Health Insurance Executive, Healthcare Quality Associate, Medical Affairs Associate, Health Informatics Analyst, TPA Operations Executive

**Mid-level roles (3-5 years experience):** Hospital Operations Manager, Health Insurance Manager, Quality Manager (NABH), Healthcare IT Manager, Medical Superintendent (administrative), Business Development Manager (hospital chain)

**Senior roles (7+ years):** CEO (Hospital), VP Hospital Operations, Chief Quality Officer, Director of Healthcare Strategy, Head of Health Insurance, Chief Administrative Officer

**Employers:** Hospital chains (Apollo, Fortis, Max, Manipal Hospitals, Narayana Health), health insurance (Star Health, ICICI Lombard, Niva Bupa), pharma (Sun Pharma, Dr. Reddy's, Cipla), health tech (Practo, PharmEasy, 1mg), and consulting (McKinsey Healthcare, Deloitte Health Sciences).

**Note:** MAHE's Manipal group operates hospital networks and medical colleges. This institutional connection gives healthcare management graduates a credibility advantage in hospital administration roles.

skills.body:
The Healthcare Management specialisation builds skills across hospital administration, health systems, and quality:

**Technical skills:**
- Hospital Operations: OPD/IPD workflow design, bed management optimisation, patient flow mapping, lean healthcare waste elimination
- Health Informatics: EHR/EMR administration, HMIS reporting, telemedicine platform evaluation, and health data analytics
- Quality: NABH standard mapping, clinical audit design, patient safety protocol development, and infection control metrics
- Insurance: health insurance product evaluation, claims workflow management, TPA coordination, and PMJAY scheme understanding

**Applied skills:**
- Hospital Planning: facility layout design, biomedical equipment procurement strategy, hospital expansion budgeting
- Health Communication: patient education programme design, community health campaign planning

**Soft skills:** Managing clinical and non-clinical staff relationships, communicating with medical professionals as a non-clinical administrator, presenting hospital performance metrics to boards, and handling patient complaints.

comparisons.body:
Comparing MAHE Online MBA Healthcare Management against peer programmes:

**vs MUJ Online MBA Healthcare Management:** MUJ at approximately ₹1,80,000 on the same platform. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹1,12,000 more. For healthcare specifically, the MAHE premium is more justifiable than other specialisations. MAHE operates Kasturba Medical College and Manipal Hospitals, giving genuine institutional healthcare credibility. MUJ does not have this same healthcare heritage. This is one specialisation where the MAHE brand carries domain-specific weight.

**vs Amity Online MBA Hospital & Healthcare Management:** Amity at ₹2,25,000 with NIRF #22 and NAAC A++. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 costs ₹67,000 more but carries NIRF #3, IoE, and the Manipal healthcare brand. Amity has a larger general alumni base. For hospital administration specifically, MAHE's institutional healthcare background is an advantage.

**vs Symbiosis Online MBA Hospital & Healthcare Management:** Symbiosis at approximately ₹2,05,000 with NAAC A+. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 is more expensive but carries stronger NAAC (A++ vs A+), higher NIRF rank, and deeper healthcare institutional heritage.

**vs LPU Online MBA Healthcare Management:** LPU at approximately ₹1,60,000 with NIRF #19. Significantly cheaper. However, LPU lacks the healthcare institutional heritage that MAHE brings through its medical colleges and hospital networks.

fees.body:
The MAHE Online MBA in Healthcare Management has a total programme fee of ₹2,92,000 inclusive of all taxes.

**Semester-wise fee breakdown:**
- Semester 1: ₹73,000
- Semester 2: ₹73,000
- Semester 3: ₹73,000
- Semester 4: ₹73,000
- **Total: ₹2,92,000**

**Application fee:** ₹500 one-time.

**Zero-cost EMI:** ₹12,167/month directly through the university.

**Scholarships (8 categories):**
- Defence Personnel / Ex-servicemen: 20%
- Divyaang / PwD: 20%
- Merit: 10% (75%+ aggregate)
- MAHE/AGE Alumni: 15%
- SAARC and EWC Nationals: 40%
- Female Learners: 15%
- Doctors: 15%
- Corporate Employees: 15%

**Important:** Learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts or offers.

**Note for doctors:** The 15% doctors' scholarship is particularly relevant for this specialisation. Clinicians transitioning to hospital administration can save ₹43,800.

**Bundled:** Coursera Plus access free with the programme.

Fees listed are indicative. EdifyEdu reconfirms fees with MAHE each quarter. Please reconfirm with our counsellor before any payment.

certificate.body:
Graduates receive an MBA degree certificate with Healthcare Management as the specialisation, issued by Manipal Academy of Higher Education (MAHE) under UGC-DEB 2020 online mode standards.

The degree carries NAAC A++ accreditation, NIRF #3 University rank, Institution of Eminence status, and WES recognition. Valid for hospital administration roles, healthcare consulting positions, health insurance management, pharma management, and public health administration. DigiLocker issuance is standard.

reviews.intro: Three reviews from MAHE Online MBA Healthcare Management students. Ratings reflect individual experience.

items.name: Dr. Anita S.
items.liked: Healthcare Operations Management and NABH quality content were directly applicable. The Manipal healthcare brand opened doors at hospital chains
items.disliked: Health Education and Communication felt more academic than practical. Could include more digital health marketing content
items.body: As a physician transitioning to hospital administration, the Manipal healthcare brand was the primary reason I chose MAHE over cheaper alternatives. The Healthcare Operations subject on OPD/IPD workflow and bed management was immediately applicable. Quality Management covering NABH preparation was the most useful subject. I used the 15% doctors' scholarship, bringing effective cost to around ₹2,48,200. For healthcare specifically, the MAHE premium over MUJ is more defensible because Manipal's hospital heritage matters to employers.

items.name: Rahul M.
items.liked: Health Insurance module covered PMJAY and TPA operations in practical depth. Hospital Planning subject was unique to this programme
items.disliked: At ₹2,92,000, even with the Manipal healthcare brand, the fee is steep. MUJ healthcare MBA exists on the same platform for ₹1,12,000 less
items.body: Working in health insurance, the Health Insurance and Health Informatics subjects were directly relevant. The Hospital Planning module covering biomedical equipment procurement and facility design was content I have not seen in other online MBAs. The MAHE brand does carry weight in healthcare circles, more so than for generic MBA specialisations. Still, ₹2,92,000 is a lot of money. MUJ offers healthcare management on the same platform for ₹1,80,000. The MAHE healthcare heritage is real, but is it worth ₹1,12,000? That depends on your specific employer.

items.name: Pooja K.
items.liked: Health Informatics covered EHR and telemedicine in current context. Coursera Plus gave access to Johns Hopkins health management courses
items.disliked: Career services for healthcare roles were limited. The loan-disqualifies-scholarship policy was a problem. Placement support did not match the premium fee
items.body: The healthcare curriculum is well designed, clearly influenced by Manipal's hospital operations experience. My concern was career support. At ₹2,92,000, I expected structured placement assistance for healthcare roles. What I received was general career services, not healthcare-specific placement support. I also lost the female learner 15% scholarship because I took a loan. If MAHE offered scholarship-plus-loan, my effective cost would have dropped to ₹2,48,200 instead of the full ₹2,92,000.

faqs.question: Why is MAHE Healthcare Management specifically stronger than generic offerings?
faqs.answer: MAHE operates Kasturba Medical College, Manipal Hospitals, and multiple health sciences programmes. The healthcare management curriculum reflects actual hospital operations experience. This institutional heritage is absent from universities that add healthcare as a generic specialisation.

faqs.question: How does MAHE Healthcare compare to MUJ Healthcare?
faqs.answer: Same platform, similar delivery. MAHE at ₹2,92,000 carries NIRF #3, IoE, and the Manipal healthcare brand (Kasturba, Manipal Hospitals). MUJ at ₹1,80,000 costs ₹1,12,000 less but lacks the same healthcare institutional heritage. For hospital administration roles specifically, the MAHE brand advantage is more defensible than for other specialisations.

faqs.question: Is there a scholarship for doctors?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Doctors scholarship offers 15% off total fees, bringing effective cost to approximately ₹2,48,200. This is relevant for clinicians transitioning to hospital administration. However, doctors opting for loan financing are not eligible for this scholarship.

faqs.question: Can loan applicants get scholarships?
faqs.answer: No. Learners opting for loan or financing are not eligible for additional discounts or offers. This is a critical consideration when comparing effective costs across programmes.

faqs.question: What is the total fee?
faqs.answer: ₹2,92,000 total (₹73,000 per semester). ₹500 application fee. Zero-cost EMI at ₹12,167/month. 8 scholarship categories available (up to 40%). Reconfirm with our counsellor before payment.

chooseIf: Manipal's healthcare heritage (Kasturba Medical College, Manipal Hospitals) matters for hospital administration credibility.
You want NABH quality management and hospital planning subjects from a university that runs hospitals.
You are a doctor transitioning to administration and can use the 15% doctors' scholarship.
NIRF #3 and IoE credential matters for hospital chain or health system employer filters.
consider: MUJ at ₹1,80,000 offers healthcare management on the same platform for ₹1,12,000 less, though without the same healthcare institutional heritage.
Symbiosis at ₹2,05,000 has a dedicated healthcare management programme at lower cost.
Loan financing disqualifies all scholarships, making MAHE one of the most expensive online MBA options.
